heroHeadline: Day 40: Ceasefire Holds but Lebanon Burns — Al Jazeera Wrap Captures Competing Victory Claims and Ongoing Strikes
heroSubtitle: Al Jazeera's day-40 situational wrap finds the US-Iran ceasefire holding while Israel continues striking Lebanon outside the truce's scope. Vance, Macron press Tehran to extend the framework; Iran's SNSC formally backs the pause. All sides claim victory.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com.
